creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: Yes, but without -R or -F there's no resuming, which is important if you are downloading large files over a bad internet connection.  I think the real bugs are broken MASTER_SITES.  The current FETCH_ARGS exposed these bugs, so let's fix them now.  For biology/gmap the new location seems to be http://research-pub.gene.com/gmap/src/
